title: TextBackcolor Property
description: Sets the background color for text.
notes:
Depending on the input image, color and shadows in the video image may reduce the legibility of character strings displayed.
  If this happens, use TextBackColor to make labels easier to read.

Values

Character string showing the background color of the label

Default: "Transparent"
